name: wf09 - 库存快照同步(每晚22:00)

parameters.query: SELECT TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS today_date, TO_CHAR(NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS yesterday_date

={{ "WITH FilteredOITW AS ( SELECT ItemCode, WhsCode, OnHand, AvgPrice, IsCommited, OnOrder, UpdateDate FROM OITW WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE OnHand > 0 ) SELECT T0.ItemCode AS item_code, T1.ItemName AS item_name, T1.FrgnName AS foreign_name, T0.WhsCode AS whs_code, T2.WhsName AS whs_name, ISNULL(T3.BinCode, 'Unknown') AS bin_code, ISNULL(T3.maxlevel,0) AS bin_max_level, ISNULL(T4.OnHandQty, 0) AS bin_qty, T1.InvntryUom AS uom, ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice) AS avg_price, CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T6.OnHandQty, 0) ELSE ISNULL(T4.OnHandQty, 0) END * ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice) AS stock_value, T5.ItmsGrpNam AS item_group, T1.ManBtchNum AS batch_managed, T7.DistNumber AS batch_number, ISNULL(T6.OnHandQty, 0) AS batch_qty, T7.MnfSerial AS mfr_batch, T7.LotNumber AS lot_number, T7.MnfDate AS mfr_date, T7.ExpDate AS exp_date, T7.InDate AS in_date, CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T6.OnHandQty, 0) ELSE ISNULL(T4.OnHandQty, 0) END AS on_hand, T1.OnHand AS total_on_hand, T0.IsCommited AS committed_qty, T0.OnOrder AS ordered_qty, T2.BinActivat AS bin_enabled, T0.UpdateDate AS sap_update_date FROM FilteredOITW T0 INNER JOIN OITM T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode INNER JOIN OWHS T2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.WhsCode = T2.WhsCode AND T2.BinActivat = 'Y' INNER JOIN OITB T5 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T1.ItmsGrpCod = T5.ItmsGrpCod INNER JOIN OIBQ T4 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T4.ItemCode AND T0.WhsCode = T4.WhsCode AND T4.OnHandQty > 0 LEFT JOIN OBIN T3 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T4.BinAbs = T3.AbsEntry LEFT JOIN OBBQ T6 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T4.BinAbs = T6.BinAbs AND T4.ItemCode = T6.ItemCode AND T6.OnHandQty > 0 LEFT JOIN OBTN T7 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode AND T6.SnBMDAbs = T7.AbsEntry UNION ALL SELECT T0.ItemCode, T1.ItemName, T1.FrgnName, T0.WhsCode, T2.WhsName, 'Default Bin', 0, T0.OnHand, T1.InvntryUom, ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice), CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T8.Quantity, 0) ELSE T0.OnHand END * ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice), T5.ItmsGrpNam, T1.ManBtchNum, T7.DistNumber, ISNULL(T8.Quantity, 0), T7.MnfSerial, T7.LotNumber, T7.MnfDate, T7.ExpDate, T7.InDate, CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T8.Quantity, 0) ELSE T0.OnHand END, T1.OnHand, T0.IsCommited, T0.OnOrder, T2.BinActivat, T0.UpdateDate FROM FilteredOITW T0 INNER JOIN OITM T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode INNER JOIN OWHS T2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.WhsCode = T2.WhsCode AND T2.BinActivat = 'N' INNER JOIN OITB T5 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T1.ItmsGrpCod = T5.ItmsGrpCod LEFT JOIN OBTQ T8 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T8.ItemCode AND T0.WhsCode = T8.WhsCode AND T8.Quantity > 0 LEFT JOIN OBTN T7 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode AND T8.SysNumber = T7.SysNumber" }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, snapshot_date: '', total_rows: 0, message: 'SAP无库存变动，保留旧快照' }) }}
